name: powerplatform-skills
description: Power Platform build skills as code. Canvas Power Apps on SharePoint plus Power Automate flows, standard Microsoft 365, no Dataverse.

plugins.name: powerplatform-skills
plugins.description: Seven skills that auto trigger on canvas Power Apps and Power Automate work: playbook, source workflow, list design, architecture and UI, Power Fx, approvals and flows, troubleshooting.
